member.name: T:AccountBalance
member.summary: This class represents the account balance object

member.name: M:AccountBalance.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Convert a byte array to an account balance object.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:AccountBalance.FromProtobuf(Proto.CryptoGetAccountBalanceResponse)
member.summary: Convert the protobuf object to an account balance object.

member.name: P:AccountBalance.Hbars
member.summary: The Hbar balance of the account

member.name: M:AccountBalance.ToBytes_2
member.summary: Convert the account balance object to a byte array.

member.name: M:AccountBalance.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert an account balance object into a protobuf.
